audit.summary: Extraction is faithful to the live page. All 10 sections (hero, 2 intros, 5 feature-splits, cta, faq) are present with correct titles, bodies, bullets, images and links. Hero title split between titleHighlight ('Capacitaire :') and title is correct. Reversed flag correctly set on the team estimation feature-split. FAQ has all 6 items in correct order with matching answers. No hallucinations, no truncations, no missing live sections.
